AI._comment: Example deployment config showing AI plugin routing setup. Copy relevant sections into your environment-specific config. Adapters are loaded by class name (string), so 'Anthropic' resolves to AI_LLM_Anthropic.php / AI/LLM/Anthropic.js.

llm._comment: LLM routing. Consumers call AI_LLM::route('smart') (PHP) or AI_LLM.route('smart') (JS). Route names are deployment conventions; the canonical set is suggested below but you can add your own.

config._comment: Direct api.anthropic.com. Best when running off-AWS. Apikey/baseUrl/version/model can be set here or in AI/anthropic/*.
Anthropic via AWS Bedrock. Use when deployed on AWS with IAM-based auth. Region from AI/aws/region.
Anthropic via Google Vertex. Use when deployed on GCP. credentialsPath='metadata' uses Workload Identity.
Google AI Studio Gemini API (simple API key).
Gemini via Vertex AI (service account auth).
Production-grade local serving with native prefix caching.
llama-cpp-server with KV slot reuse for explicit cache control.
Casual local. No prefix caching; keep-alive for warmup only.

routes._comment: Logical route -> provider. Consumers ask for 'smart' / 'fast' / 'vision' / etc.; this map decides the actual backend at deployment time. Override per deployment.

models._comment: Default model name per provider class (used if not overridden in providers.*.config.model).

anthropic._comment: Direct Anthropic settings. apiKey is required; baseUrl/version have sensible defaults.

vertex._comment: Vertex AI settings. credentialsPath options: path to service account JSON, or 'metadata' for Workload Identity on GKE/Cloud Run.

local._comment: Local LLM serving. allowedHosts whitelists which hosts AI_LLM_Local will connect to (SSRF guard).

openAI._comment: Existing OpenAI settings consumed by AI_LLM_Openai.

aws._comment: AWS Bedrock. region is required by the SDK; credentials via IAM role or env vars.

voice._comment: Realtime voice routing. Same routes-of-providers pattern as LLM. See AI/Voice/<Provider>.php for adapters.

config._comment: Azure OpenAI Realtime. Set AI/azureOpenai/* for endpoint+deployment+apiKey.
xAI Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0. OpenAI-Realtime compatible wire format.
Gemini Live API. Server-to-server only; clients connect via proxy.
Local Pipecat / LiveKit Agents gateway. Adapter just returns a WebSocket URL.

routes._comment: Logical route -> provider. Consumers ask for 'conversational', 'reasoning', 'cheap', etc.

azureOpenai._comment: Azure OpenAI Service settings (used for both LLM and Voice Realtime).
